positive: A central, symmetrical, and highly stylized celestial wildlife scene. The main subject is a majestic, stylized owl perched on a crescent moon, surrounded by swirling cosmic flora and nebulous constellations. Use a clean silhouette aesthetic with highly contrasting ink saturation against a deep navy and midnight blue background. The style should evoke Art Nouveau and psychedelic stained glass, featuring luminous, glowing geometric patterns that outline the feathers and leaves. The composition must be perfectly balanced and highly scalable for textile printing, utilizing strong black outlines and vibrant jewel-toned accents (teal, amethyst, gold leaf effect). Ultra detailed, vector quality illustration, cinematic lighting, centered composition.
